dynamicemailroutingactormodel.emailroutingdescription: Route the To address based on a form field value. The base To field is used as a fallback if no route matches.
dynamicemailroutingactormodel.conditionmatchdescription: Choose whether all conditions must match (AND) or any condition must match (OR).
dynamicemailroutingactormodel.conditionsdescription: Define conditions that must be met for the email to be sent. Leave empty to always send.
